hero.headline: My Property
hero.intro: One or two sentences highlighting your 3 best features — location, comfort, standout amenity. Keep it under 140 characters.

description.short: A short description of your property for SEO and previews.
description.long: A longer, detailed description of your property. Describe the setting, architecture, amenities, and what guests can expect during their stay.

rooms.name: Room Name
rooms.shortDescription: A short description of this room
rooms.description: A detailed description of this room — size, style, views, and what makes it special.

reviews.author: Guest Name
reviews.text: A wonderful stay. The property exceeded our expectations in every way.

faq.question: What time is check-in and check-out?
faq.answer: Check-in is from 15:00 and check-out is by 11:00. Early check-in and late check-out may be available on request.

faq.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: Free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in. Please contact us for details.

location.description: Describe the location of your property — nearby landmarks, how to get there, and what guests can explore in the area.

nearbyAttractions.name: Nearby Attraction
nearbyAttractions.description: A description of a nearby point of interest.

policies.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in.

seo.title: My Property | Vacation Rental
seo.description: Book your stay at My Property. A unique vacation rental experience.
